title: 工具输出扁平化（Flatten Tool Output）
affects: nexau core (tool yaml, tool executor, middleware, messages)

tasks.title: 扩展 ToolYamlSchema 与 Tool 构造器，支持 formatter 配置并默认回退到 xml
tasks.ref: Implemented in workspace; verified via targeted pytest suites and make typecheck

tasks.title: 实现 formatter resolver，支持 builtin alias（首期仅 xml）与 import path
tasks.ref: Implemented in workspace; verified via targeted pytest suites and make typecheck

tasks.title: 实现默认 XML formatter，并为 MCP / Python tool 的图片输出建立 bypass 规则

tasks.title: 扩展 AfterToolHookInput / HookResult / MiddlewareManager，支持 raw tool_output 与 llm_tool_output 双通道
tasks.ref: Implemented in workspace; verified via targeted pytest suites and make typecheck

tasks.title: 在 tool 执行链路中先执行 formatter，再进入 after_tool middleware
tasks.ref: Implemented in workspace; verified via targeted pytest suites and make typecheck

tasks.title: 修改 LongToolOutputMiddleware，优先对 llm_tool_output 做截断、持久化与提示注入

tasks.title: 明确并实现 AgentEventsMiddleware / LoggingMiddleware 的双通道消费策略

tasks.title: 调整 ToolResultBlock 构建链路，仅消费最终 llm_tool_output，并移除 repr fallback

tasks.title: 为 AgentTool 配置 custom formatter，并补充单元测试、集成测试与手动验证

tasks.title: 验证 Sub-agent 长输出不再被 Dict 包裹且前端事件仍保留 raw output 语义
